<UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Phantom actions<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> are special actions that are available only during the course of specific duties.

Depending on the undertaken duty, <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>you may select up to five phantom actions<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> to supplement your job actions.
Phantom actions are used by clicking their icon, or by assigning Duty Actions I and II to a keybind.
Phantom actions, as well as other duty actions, may also be registered directly to your hotbar.

You can freely cycle between phantom actions, with the action to be executed always displaying in the center of the HUD.

<CommandIcon(14)/>＋<Gui(17)/> button: cycle phantom actions
<CommandIcon(15)/>＋<Gui(17)/> button: execute phantom actions
